response: CLOCK CLOCK CLOCK TO ACHIEVE A TWENTY-FIVE PERCENT REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE USING THE FUNCTION E(N) EQUALS ONE MINUS ONE MINUS ZERO POINT ZERO TWO RAISED TO THE POWER OF N, WE SOLVE FOR N BY SETTING ONE MINUS ZERO POINT ZERO TWO TO THE POWER OF N EQUAL TO ZERO POINT SEVEN-FIVE, WHICH YIELDS N APPROXIMATELY EQUAL TO ONE HUNDRED AND TWENTY-ONE, SO ALEX MUST ADD ONE HUNDRED AND TWENTY-ONE ADVANCED COMPONENTS TO THE BIKE.
